pi_items.source: Database query: SELECT name, value, isvendor FROM c_bpartner WHERE c_bpartner_id=114 => 'Tree Farm Inc.|TreeFarm|Y'. Vendor exists with search key 'TreeFarm', isvendor=Y, iscustomer=N.
Database query: SELECT m_product_id, name, value FROM m_product WHERE name='Oak Tree' AND ad_client_id=11 => '123|Oak Tree|Oak'. Product exists with search key 'Oak', producttype=I (Item).
Task description specifies 25 units of Oak Tree. This is the quantity the agent must enter. Verified that quantity field accepts integer values in iDempiere PO line form.

Database query: SELECT m_product_id, name, value FROM m_product WHERE name='Holly Bush' AND ad_client_id=11 => '129|Holly Bush|Holly Bush'. Product exists with search key 'Holly Bush', producttype=I (Item).
Task description specifies 40 units of Holly Bush. This is the quantity the agent must enter.

This is a user-defined check number specified in the task description. The agent must type this exact string into the Check No field of the AP Payment form. No pre-existing check with this number exists.

Database query: SELECT ba.c_bankaccount_id, ba.accountno, ba.name, b.name FROM c_bankaccount ba JOIN c_bank b ON ba.c_bank_id=b.c_bank_id WHERE ba.c_bankaccount_id=100 => '100|1234|1234|MoneyBank'. Bank account exists as a Checking (type C) account at MoneyBank.
Database query confirms bank name is 'MoneyBank' (c_bank table). Two checking accounts exist: 1234 (id=100) and 5678 (id=101).
Database query: c_bankaccount.accountno='1234' for c_bankaccount_id=100. This is also the display name of the account.
Database query confirms c_bankaccount_id=100 for the MoneyBank account with accountno=1234.

Database query: SELECT pricestd FROM m_productprice pp JOIN m_pricelist_version plv ON pp.m_pricelist_version_id=plv.m_pricelist_version_id WHERE plv.m_pricelist_id=102 AND pp.m_product_id=123 AND plv.name='Purchase 2003' => 36. The standard purchase price for Oak Tree is $36.00.
Database query: Same query for m_product_id=129 => 24. The standard purchase price for Holly Bush is $24.00.
Calculated: 25 x $36.00 (Oak Tree) + 40 x $24.00 (Holly Bush) = $900.00 + $960.00 = $1,860.00. Tax rate is 0% (Standard tax category, rate=0 for both sales and purchase). Grand total = $1,860.00.
Database queries: Both products have c_taxcategory='Standard'. Standard tax rate=0% (sopotype='B' meaning both sales and purchase). Vendor istaxexempt='N' but the tax rate itself is 0%.
Database query: SELECT ad_org_id, name FROM ad_org WHERE name='HQ' AND ad_client_id=11 => 11|HQ.
Database query: SELECT ad_menu_id, name, action FROM ad_menu WHERE name='Payment Allocation' => 245|Payment Allocation|X. The Payment Allocation form (action=X) exists in the menu system.

privileged_info_summary: Tree Farm Inc. (c_bpartner_id=114, search_key=TreeFarm) is a vendor (isvendor=Y, iscustomer=N) in GardenWorld. Oak Tree (m_product_id=123, search_key=Oak) has a standard purchase price of $36.00 and Holly Bush (m_product_id=129, search_key=Holly Bush) has a standard purchase price of $24.00, both from the Purchase 2003 price list version (m_pricelist_id=102). The expected Purchase Order grand total is $1,860.00 (25x$36 + 40x$24 = $900 + $960), with 0% tax (Standard tax category, rate=0%). The bank account is MoneyBank account number 1234 (c_bankaccount_id=100, type=Checking). The required check number is CHK-P2P-2026-001. All five documents (Purchase Order, Material Receipt, Vendor Invoice, AP Payment, and Payment Allocation) must have document status CO (Completed). After allocation, the vendor invoice should show ispaid=Y. The Payment Allocation is accessible via menu item 'Payment Allocation' (action type X/Form). Organization is HQ (ad_org_id=11). Document types are: Purchase Order (c_doctype_id=126), MM Receipt (122), AP Invoice (123), AP Payment (125). Login credentials are GardenAdmin/GardenAdmin.
